entry.title: SAP CPI--> S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Dear All,

I'm new to S4 HANA integrations. I want to upload exchange rate data from an API into a table in SAP S/4 HANA via SAP CPI. My question is how can we setup connectivity with S/4 HANA and post the data to that particular TCURR table. Also, which receiver adapter is best suited for this scenario. 

Kindly help with your inputs.

Thank you,

Sri

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA Hybrid Connector - Classic vs New Product co...
entry.content:
Hi Vasanth,

thanks for your question.

Please see below the answer from 3E:

1. Question : Will this Hybrid connector enable us to transfer the classic DG master data to Advanced DG Basic/Enclosure specific classification and can it be enhanced from there ? or How exactly should we maintain the DG data whether in classic DG or new DG solution or else in both DG areas from DG specialist perspective ?

Answer: The Hybrid adapter transfers Basic DG classification from Classic to New, it does not transfer packaging specific data. The idea is to do the basic DG classification in Classic (automatic or manually) and transfer it once it is saved to New. In New the packaging data can be added, and all further DG Management can be done in New.

2. Question will this connector allow us to transfer the Advanced New S/4 DG data to Classic Product safety section 14 information ?

Answer: The 3E Hybrid adapter can currently not transfer DG data from New to Classic due to different data models. We are evaluating if there is a possibility to print section 14 data from New in the WWI report in Classic.

In case of further questions concerning the 3E Hybrid Adapter please contact us at info@3eco.com.

Thanks

Ulrike

entry.title: Re: How to Connect S4HANA Public Cloud With SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi @saikat_pal5 , There are no authorization group id values present in my S4 Cloud. How can i create it?
I am using "SAP_COMM_0531" communication arrangement.

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Munich 2024 (#sitMUC) - Secure Your Spot Now!

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA Hybrid Connector - Classic vs New Product co...

entry.title: is there any way to push comments from SAC to datasphere table?
entry.content: I'm trying to store all comments that are entered by users in sac analytic application or stories from SAC to sap datasphere table, if there is any option to do that suggest me!

entry.title: Material With Sub-Material without Subcontracting for New Purchase
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Scenario: A business captures bundled materials as finished goods for procurement. The finished good (bundle) consists of several sub-items that need to be recorded under the main material, with the total cost of the bundle reflected in the purchase order header.

Note: It’s not a part of subcontracting.

Material

Cost

GST

Tyre assemble with sub material

15000

18%

Sub Materials – Tyre

Sub Materials – Tube

Sub Materials – Flap

 

 

10000

2500

2500

18%

18%

18%

entry.title: Re: Unable to Create the GL account groups in the CBC
entry.content: Hi Owen, It is not allowing to create the account group start with Y like YINT.

entry.title: Re: Payment Processing tab in Purchase Order
entry.content:
You dont find the Payment processing tab in ME21N despite LOG_MMFI_P2P being active most likely because the Down payment is supressed in OLME > Purchase order > Define Screen Layout at Document Level

Activate it for ME21N, ME22N, NBF, PT0F (Standard item purchase order), etc.

Selection group GR/IR control

Second check box from the bottom.

entry.title: How to send txt file to Non- SAP System via oData Service through ABAP Program
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have requirement to read the txt file contents and send the same via OData service which should be called with payload via https to the endpoint. The same should be triggered within an ABAP Program.

Any help/pointers if someone has knowledge on this subject ?

Best Regards,

Navin

entry.title: Re: Production Order Change management (OCM)- 1
entry.content: can we use PEO along with this

entry.title: Re: About users with profile SAP_ALL
entry.content:
Dear Sandra_Rossi

Not assigned to all users. Assigned only to a limited number of users.
Should users with profile SAP_ALL be zero?
We would appreciate it if you could also answer questions 2 and 3.

entry.title: Re: VS Code SAP FIORI Tools - Application Modeler
entry.content: Hi, can you please ensure you restart VSCode after the new version was installed. Can you also check if there was any error in a popup message when trying to launch the generator? Thanks.

entry.title: Manage Performance in SAP Analytic Cloud Stories - New Learning Journey
entry.content:
You are creating stories in SAP Analytics Cloud and want to make sure that they run with good performance?
Then check out our new Learning Journey "Managing Performance in SAP Analytics Cloud".

We will start with the basics on trouble shooting and introduce you the tools you can use in SAP Analytics Cloud. Then we will dive deeper into the following topics:

  • Optimizing Performance in Story Design
    The general design of a story has a huge impact on the performance, in this unit you see an example of a bad and good design taken from a real world customer example.
  • Optimizing Performance in Data Loading
    Have you ever wondered what the different "loading optimization settings" are and when to use which one? Are you sure you effectively use the "pause refresh" setting on widget level? If not this unit is made for you.
  • Optimizing Script Performance
    Creating your first script isn't a big deal but form a performance perspective a lot can go wrong. Get introduced to the Main- and Sandboxworker thread and that teaches you to write effective code.

The content will be updated with every new quarterly release.

After working through the learning journey and passing the embedded quizzes you can claim your "Record of Achievement".

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA Product compliance - Safety Data Sheet creat...
entry.content:
Hi Shashi,

if you would like to get further info concerning the 3E Hybrid Adapter, you can contact us at info@3eco.com.

Thanks

Ulrike

entry.title: Interview scheduling not usable. Please vote
entry.content:
Hello. We are very fond of Using Recruiting as a module, as it is user friendly and allows us plenty of configuration possibilities-

Unfortunately we are still not able to fully cover end to end process in the module due to issues with interview scheduling. It is not working properly  for virtual emails and  it is not sensitive to different RSVP scenarios . We can apply workarounds but then it´s just easier to schedule the interview directly in outlook. When will interview scheduling be improved? This is a crucial issue and should be prioritized on the road map. AI is not our priority, our priority is for basic functionalities to work, please

Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence (sap.com)

entry.title: The Last Changed date on Purchase Order Items is not updated
entry.content:
Hello!

 

We would like to confirm one thing.

In our private cloud system, we have noticed that when a purchasing document status becomes "Fully Delivered" by the receipt of goods, the last changed date of the Purchase Order Items is not updated accordingly. Is this a standard behaviour that the date is not updated by the change of the status?

Thank you in advance,

Regards

Fujita

entry.title: Re: Need to copy PR nr after creation
entry.content:
Hi 

In addition to Dominik 

When you create PR then click other  purchase requisition. It also popup created purchase requisition number

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Update of UDF avoid sync
entry.content:
Ist it possible to avoid that an update of a cloud only UDF, creates an IDOC that gets sent to ECC via Connector?
Or some other way I can say that this update should not trigger any more actions?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Update of UDF avoid sync
entry.content: yes it is possible via erp sync filter

entry.title: when we open the SAC add-in file in SAC it should automatically sign in?
entry.content:
Hello,

Can anyone help me here, SSO is enabled and when i am trying to open the SAC add-in file it ask me sign in again?

entry.title: Re: SAP Slipstream Engine: Keyboard opens automatically i...
entry.content:
We are facing the same issue but it's a bigger problem when it's about the verification fields in RF which should be scanned. The virtual keyboard mess this up and sometimes it not even possible to see what field you are working with..

Amazing that there does not seem to be an easy fix for this problem. Are companies around the world working with RF (not the best to start with) and then having this virtual keyboard covering almost all screen on devices which should scan?

@tamas_hoznek is there any way of doing something ourself similar to planned update in SP19? I have searched everywhere on this topic if there is a way to hide/close virtual keyboard via javascript that somehow could be used in Personas scripting?

entry.title: Re: VS Code SAP FIORI Tools - Application Modeler
entry.content: I already restarted. There is no popup message when I try to run the 'Fiori: Open Application Generator' command. I tried to run the 'Open Application Wizard' command I got an error in a popup. It says the command 'Open Template Wizard' resulted in an error: Cannot read properties of undefined(reading 'getNodeProcessVersions'). I also tried the 'Fiori: Add Sap System' command, SAP System Details page opened, so I think that command works.

entry.title: Re: For STO POin S4, in Me21n,Not possible to determine s...
entry.content:
Hi Dominik, 1.Yes Receiving Plant-NZE3(Customer No 2102) Sales org-NESO,DISTRIBUTION CHANNEL-N1 &DIVISON NZ Maintained

2.Supplying plant NZE1(Customer No 2101), Sales org-NESO,DISTRIBUTION CHANNEL-N1 &DIVISON NZ Maintained in spro for shipping data for plants

 

 

NZE1 PLANT- 2101 CUTOMER ASSIGNED

NZE3 PLANT- 2102 CUTOMER ASSIGNED

KNA1 TABLE

Error Screenshot

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hi, I'm Arun from India, happy to join it.

entry.title: Re: Multiple entry option in Input parameters of Graphica...
entry.content:
Hi Joe, 

I always use Analytic Model Filter Variable

 

Directly in view you cannot create a variable. Or at least I do not as it makes no sense as the system will fetch all the data, regardless of the selection. Variables work only in DSP, not for fetching the data from source system - as far as I know 🙂

 

Cheers

Martin

entry.title: Restore back the data after Tenant refresh
entry.content:
Restore back the data after Tenant refresh


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Restore back the data after Tenant refresh
entry.content:
Once the tenant refresh is performed ,SAP cannot revert back the old tenant Data.

If incase user has active restore point is created before the refresh activity then we can restore back .

Else we cannot restore back the old data.

entry.title: Re: VS Code SAP FIORI Tools - Application Modeler
entry.content: Thanks for the update. That helps a little. It looks like the Application Wizard extension (which the Fiori generator uses) is not installed correctly. Could you uninstall that extension and re-install it? There wasn't a new version of this released recently. Also, can you confirm the version of node.js you have installed? I can ask some of the Application Wizard colleague to support if re-installing the extension doesn't work. Thanks.

entry.title: SAC Add-in file in SAC Environment, transport Dev to quality it should automatically change the URL?

entry.title: Re: Considerations on Performance Classes in SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content: Excellent Overview of the sizing topic! Thank you

entry.title: How to access comments in BW/4HANA for reporting purposes
entry.content:
I have used the commenting function in #BW/4HANA for data point comments in a query. Technically, the document store object is used. The following image shows my architecture

I have recorded two comments. Now I would like to evaluate the comments in a separate report or process them with machine learning later.

 

The question now is how I can access the comments in the #BW/4HANA backend. When I look at the data (tables via SE11) in DSO /1BW/DOAHD5Z, I see all the data around the comment, but not the comment itself.

 

The question now is, in which table or where are the comments themselves stored and how can I access them to build a report based on them. The report shall give me only all comments.

entry.title: Re: VS Code SAP FIORI Tools - Application Modeler
entry.content: Still, nothing happens when I run Open Application Generator command. I have node v22.09.0 installed.

entry.title: Re: BW/4HANA Task Chain Log Table
entry.content: Hi, Thanks for the information. Is there any SE16N table that I can get those process chain status as a list? after that, I aim to create an automatic email.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content: My favorite VSCode extensions are:

entry.title: Solution Manager7.2 FPS15の監視対象について
entry.content:
お世話になっております。

SolutionManager7.2 FPS15で監視可能なシステムについてお聞きしたいです。
監視対象は以下の通りです。
　・SAP ERP 6.0 EHP6.0 

Note 2248724を参照しましたが、FPS15についての記載がなかった為、
問合せさせていただいております。

よろしくお願いします。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Solution Manager7.2 FPS15の監視対象について
entry.content:
ご担当者　様

いつもお世話になっております。

SAP ERP 6.0 & EhPx for ERP 6.0はサポートしております。

LMDBにてインストールされたソフトウェア・コンポーネントは自動的に提供されますが、製品バージョンと製品インスタンスは手動で割り当てる必要があることを、ご注意ください。

下記のドキュメントで｢SAP ERP 6.0 & EhPx for ERP 6.0｣をご検索頂き、SAP Solution Manager 7.2 における管理対象システムのメンテナンス情報をご参考ください。

Maintenance of Product in the System Landscape | SAP Help Portal 

宜しくお願いいたします。

SAPサポート

entry.title: I need SAP BO IDT setup file,where can I get it?Please help
entry.content: I need SAP BO IDT setup file,where can I get it?Please help

entry.title: Developing with SAP Integration Suite - Wrong exercise in the lesson.
entry.content:
On Developing with SAP Integration Suite/Using Mappings

The first exercise in the lesson is a previous exercise. I was able to see the right one before it was replaced by this, so I know that this isn't the correct one and I was so confused when I got back to continue this exercise.


I cant seem to find any flag or report button to inform anyone to fix this. I really want to continue this guide and I only have 3 days left on my trial.

entry.title: Re: Base price list not found
entry.content:
Mike - Thank you for this explanation is has solved the issue I was having with uploading UOM Prices

For Added context if you are uploading UOM prices for currency USD I had to use the file for ITM1 (with price blank) and also file for ITM9 at the same time when uploading into DTW
ITM1 = "Items_Prices"
ITM9 = "UOMPrices"

Your comment has saved me weeks of fighting with DTW templates, Many thanks

entry.title: Re: For STO POin S4, in Me21n,Not possible to determine s...
entry.content:
Hi  Sandy 

Please check and assign customer data per thread 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/sto-define-shipping-data-for-plant/qaq-p/7563379

In STO pant may be vendor and customer ,so how system comes to know which plant is customer and which plant is vendor

If you assign sales area i.e. sales organization. distribution channel and division to plant then it will you vendor in sap

and when you assign customer number to plant then it will be a receiving plant and supplying plant material should have a supplying plant sales area and receiving plant material not required sales area,

If you configuration is correct then and then only shipping tab comes in PO

that's the reason In the STO process set up "Define shipping data for the plant" is necessary

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: SAP S4HANA Public Cloud Best Practices PP Module
entry.content:
I understand that you can download files about best practices for SAP S4HANA public cloud from SAP Process Navigator.
Please tell me the ID and name of the representative scope items of module PP (production management)

entry.title: Re: how to find existing smartform program driver
entry.content:
Hi,

You have tagged HCM Payroll. If your smart form is being done via HR Forms then go to 'Layout'  - 'Environment' -> 'Function Module Name'

bg

entry.title: Re: Missing Automated Defect Recording Pop Up for QM-Quality Notification
entry.content: Hi Becca, We have the same issue. Customizing and master data is set correctly, but in app QA32 it works as intended but in the app F1685A (Record Inspection Results) the pop-up does not appear. Did you find the solution?

entry.title: Re: Microsoft Outlook and Teams Integration for Interview Scheduling
entry.content:
Hi Anant034, do you have any suggestions how to track new time proposals by intived attendees or if the decline? How recruiters would be able to track that without having a personal contact?

Is there also a way to automatically generate meeting link for virtual meetings?

 

Best regards,

Jekaterina

entry.title: Curricula without due date does not show in learning plan in new learning experience.
entry.content:
Curricula without due date does not show in learning plan in new learning experience.

If we assign a curriculum to a learner without due date, learner will get a notification that learning plan has been updated with link to learning plan.
However, in case user has new learning experience, this will not show in learning plan (in legacy view it will show).
User needs to be creative and should use the drop down to find curricula and only there learner will notice there are items assigned.
Is it possible to update the new learning experience page so that it is clear that there is a curriculum assigned to complet (without due date) ?

entry.title: Re: /scwm/adgi - Posting Date in Inventory Management for Migration
entry.content: Hi Luka, This is related to the GI process CNCM- an exception , the field Posting date is available for Entry.

entry.title: Re: For STO POin S4, in Me21n,Not possible to determine s...
entry.content: @Sandy8 Make sure that the customers are created in the sales area NESO N1 NZ

entry.title: Re: 1H 2024 Product Release - How to copy a role with the latest RBP experience?
entry.content: Hi, SAP wrote it would be available in the 2H2024 release.

entry.title: Re: Which SAP Activate Roadmap is for PaPM Cloud implemen...
entry.content:
Hello YI,

We have no experience with SAP Activate but looking into the info you presented it looks like it would depend on the customer requirement really. Cannot offer to suggest which one you should choose on the list of Cloud Methodologies available as already highlighted in the screenshot, it is Specific hence it can vary from one solution to another.
You should try to check this with SAP Activate if SAP PaPM Cloud is in their pipeline.

Nevertheless, there are some blogpost which you can read on through and make use of for the tips on implementation of SAP PaPM Cloud such as:
https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-blogs-by-sap/sap-profitability-and-performance-management-cloud-subscription/ba-p/13518196
https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-blogs-by-sap/sap-papm-cloud-modeling-environment-lifecycle-promotion/ba-p/13515235
https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-blogs-by-sap/sap-papm-cloud-let-us-talk-about-integration/ba-p/13528491

These are only a few but you can check more via help portal: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_PROFITABILITY_PERFORMANCE_MANAGEMENT_CLOUD
You may also browse through Content Type: Blogposts under this link: https://community.sap.com/t5/c-khhcw49343/SAP+Profitability+and+Performance+Management/pd-p/73555000100800000092

My opinion is it would be better to contact SAP Sales/Presales representative for this matter.

Thanks and regards,

Gene

entry.title: Re: SBPA - Workflow - My Inbox application custom attributes
entry.content: Hi All is this feature supported for sbpa ui task after defining the attributes in sbpa task and enabling custom attributes in my inbox copy app those do not show up any idea ?

entry.title: Re: ECC to S/4HANA - Pre-Projects
entry.content:
Hi, 

for the RISE customer upgrading from 2020 to 2023, I'm would recommend to run the readiness check.  There are probably compatibility scope items that need to be fixed and this can be done upfront.

https://me.sap.com/readinesscheck/home

kind regards, Jurgen

entry.title: Re: VS Code SAP FIORI Tools - Application Modeler
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm facing the same issue. The Application Generator worked fine until yesterday. When I try to start it today, nothing happens. When I run command 'Open Template Wizzard' I get an error message saying "Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'getNodeProcessVersion')"

 

Regards,

Jochen

entry.title: XXXX No service provider was defined for CoCd
entry.content:
Hello all, XXXXVIDEOHERE

We're encountering an issue when submitting a billing invoice in eDocument Cockpit. The error message states: "No service provider was defined for CoCd 5542."

We suspect this is a configuration issue, but we haven't been able to locate where the problem lies. This situation is in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and is related to our operations in Mexico.

Any assistance would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: New Member
entry.content:
Hi all, I am currently an intern specializing in SAP ABAP, and I would like to express my gratitude for the Digital Skills Initiative. I am highly motivated to participate because I believe that enhancing my digital skills will greatly complement my current experience and help me grow in my professional journey. This opportunity aligns perfectly with my career goals, and I look forward to learning and contributing actively. Thank you for this fantastic initiative!

entry.title: Re: VS Code SAP FIORI Tools - Application Modeler
entry.content: Thanks a lot for the update. There was a new release of MS Visual Studio Code since yesterday, version 1.94. This looks to have broken the Application Wizard (which the Fiori generator uses). As a workaround, could you downgrade to the previous VSCode version? You can find it at: https://code.visualstudio.com/updates/v1_93. We will continue to investigate at our side also.

entry.title: Re: New! Check on one single page all of your Identity Authentication and Identity Provisioning tena
entry.content: Thank you very much!!! Saved my day..

entry.title: Re: IAS authentication created by booster not working
entry.content: Thank you!

entry.title: XXX SAP Hana error: Number not defined for material type viral
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm creating a new material in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and encountered an error XXX related to material master number ranges.

After some research, I found that the number range needs to be set up and assigned to the material type. However, I couldn't find the MMNR transaction in the Fiori UI or the option to assign number range intervals in the Central Business Configuration (CBC).

Can anyone guide me on where to locate this assignment in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud CBC?

Thank you for your help.

Best regards,
XXXX22

SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud

Planning and Dispatching Extensions | SAP Help Portal 

Best regards

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to create a button in the FSM to perform a specif...
entry.content:
Yes it is possible via extensions .please check 

Planning and Dispatching Extensions | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: QM WITH NOT BLOCK STOCK IN QM
entry.content:
Hello,
I don't know which process you want to apply but there is a qm settings for each inspection type. You can manage this process with Post to Insp Stock option. It determines whether realated to qm stock or not when your inspection lot generated

entry.title: Re: TabStrip in Popup does not work in different pages of the SAC Story
entry.content:
Hi @Bobbo ,

I would recommend to store the tab value in a script variable before open the popup.

Button script to open a popup

tabValue = 'Tab_2';
StoryPopup_2.open();

After in the editscript of Popup_4 -> onOpen, consume the variable and apply to the tabstrip.

TabStrip_1.setSelectedKey(tabValue);

 

Thank you,

Rui

entry.title: Re: Automatically populate Person Responsible in IW32/33...
entry.content: Hi, thanks for all your input. I followed your advice and was able to update the person responsible in the partners internal table for the BAPI

entry.title: Re: TabStrip in Popup does not work in different pages of...
entry.content:
Hi @Bobbo ,

I would recommend to store the tab value in a script variable before open the popup.

 

Button script to open a popup

tabValue = 'Tab_2';
StoryPopup_2.open();

After in the editscript of Popup_4 -> onOpen, consume the variable and apply to the tabstrip.

 

TabStrip_1.setSelectedKey(tabValue);

 

Thank you,

Rui

entry.title: Re: Unable to locate b1s_sqltable.conf
entry.content: Any other solutions, please?

entry.title: Re: 🇦🇹 SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code (Vienna, Austria)
entry.content:
Hi Tomasz,

I don't know exactly what @Dan_Wroblewski  and @Rekha_DR planned, but typically they provide very good tutorials that you can follow at your own speed and catch up (in any case I would try to complete the SAP Build prerequisites BEFORE you come, as it will increase your learning time onsite.). Thus I think it will be no issue.
Have a safe trip! 
Franz

entry.title: Re: SAP TechEd Virtual: Your SAP Community viewing party | Bangalore

Regards, 

Azmath.

entry.title: Re: FBD1
entry.content:
Hey, I'm also looking for a solution to create automated recurring posting documents. Does the "POST_DOCUMENT" also create the FBD1 recurring entry? I tried to test with SE37, but it created only a posting document in FB03 but not in FBD3. Help would be very appreciated. 

KR

Thomas

entry.title: Re: Move data only to first product in the hierarchy belo...
entry.content:
As you already have the connection of PL6 and PL7, I assume probably you don't need FOREACH loop at all. 

Maybe you can try something as below: 

CONFIG.HIERARCHY = [d/PRODUCT].[h/L7] 

MEMBERSET [d/PRODUCT].[p/SKUPL6] != " "

DATA() = RESULTLOOKUP([d/PRODUCT] = [d/PRODUCT].[p/SKUPL6] )

DELETE([d/PRODUCT] = [d/PRODUCT].[p/SKUPL6])

entry.title: Re: For STO POin S4, in Me21n,Not possible to determine shipping data for material XXXX- Error Messa
entry.content: Hi Dominik, Customer is created for the same sales area

entry.title: Sales Pricing analysis Fiori App
entry.content:
Hello All,

I would like to understand if there is a similar Pricing analysis functionality available in any of the Sales Fiori apps.  Does anyone have any idea or know how to achieve similar functionality in Fiori? Thank you in advance.

 

   

BR, Sampath

entry.title: Re: Transporting content in SAP BUILD Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi Manjunath,

Apologies for the almost year-late reply! 😊

There’s no hard reason for keeping it separated —just following organizational best practices. Since this is a shared service used by several (or all) normal landscape extensions and integration subaccounts, it makes sense to keep it separate in its own (or common DevOps) subaccount. Plus, this way, that horde of destinations won’t clutter up your development subaccount! 😉

Best regards,
Vladimir

entry.title: Re: Launch Fiori Launchpad in the "Create a SAP Fiori based Table Maintenance app"
entry.content:
You can follow this tutorial to integrate your app in Work Zone: Integrate Your Application with SAP Build Work Zone, Standard Edition | SAP Tutorials

You'll first have to deploy your app to BTP from BAS.

entry.title: Payment
Re: SAP BTP Partner Hands-on Excellence Program (HEP) Workshop Catalog
entry.content:
Hi Wallace, 

We can organize a similar setup for customers. Just forward requests to me via e-mail andreas.hirche@sap.com.

Kind Regards, Andreas

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

My name is Thanh Pham, and I am currently working as a Senior Basis Consultant. I’m very glad to have discovered this program through my colleagues, which has provided me with a voucher. This initiative is part of my continuous effort to grow and become a better version of myself every day.

I am writing to apply for the SAP Certified Specialist - SAP S/4HANA Conversion and SAP System Upgrade certificate.
https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-specialist-sap-s-4hana-conversion-and-sap-system-upgrade

Thanks and best regards,

Thanh Pham

entry.title: Re: For STO POin S4, in Me21n,Not possible to determine s...
entry.content: Hi Rashid, thanks for the reply, I maintained as you said sales area tos upplying plant and customer number to receiving plant, evident from the screenshots, Even though shipping tab is not coming

entry.title: B1 Asset Revaluation No matching records found
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Error No matching records found is encountered when posting an Asset Revaluation. 

To replicate issue, post an asset revaluation for Derived Area - successful. Then post another asset revaluation for main area - with error.

Can you please advise? Thank you.

entry.title: Re: ABAP OO Design applied to ABAP RESTful Programming model (RAP) - Unmanaged scenario
entry.content:
Hi @AlwinPut,

great post! I know this post is already some years old, but you mentioned you would also post an introduction on how you would handle managed scenarios.

@AlwinPut wrote:
In the upcoming blog post I will describe my research on applying OO design to the RAP managed scenario.

I was not able to find a post from you regarding that. Would you consider writing a post about that? I would love to read about your views and approach on managed scenarios!

entry.title: Re: function OIGI_LOADING_CREATE
entry.content: I want to know the detail description of  "I_SUBRC" .

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content:
@Tunir @PeiL 

Dear Tunir,

you missed out an important detail in your answer to PeiL regarding:
"ability to blend the data models (linking the same dimension between data models together)"

For filtering it might work. But if you want to have measures from different sources combined in a table - that does not work in 'Optimized Design Mode' . When does this feature come? In our opinion this is the most interesting feature for self service BI. And SAP has decided to get rid of it - why?

entry.title: NCI Value does not match after running carry forward business rule
entry.content:
HI All,

I am facing issue in Balance carry forward where NCI value is not matching with OP VS Closing.

PFA screen shot where GL390000 is NCI Account & 310099 is retained earning CY.

we also kept IC elim & INVEST Audit IDs are set to "NO"

Kindly advise , why GLs value is not matching.

Above mentioned is b/S rule created for NCI for Elimination and adjustment.

 

Br,

Rahul

entry.title: How can I create a date function?
entry.content:
How can I create a date function?

I don't see the 'Add' button. Is it because I'm using the starter system?

I would really appreciate any guidance. Thank you so much!

entry.title: showAdditionalAttributes does not work for SBPA Process UI task
entry.content:
Dear SAP team,

i tries using the showAdditionalAttributes property of My inbox app in BTP work zone site to display additional task attributes defined on SBPA process user task ,but somehow this does not display this information ,is this feature supported now ,please confirm ,documentation does not say anything about this feature now but inbox app has this property set as false .

Configure the My Inbox App | SAP Help Portal

if this is not supported then what is the purpose of defining the attributes at task level i am unbale to understand.

Any quick response is more than welcome.

Thanks,
Siddharth

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: How to view logs of SAP_FIN_GL_REVERSE_ACCR_DEFER after more than 14 days?
entry.content:
It seems this job loses its history after 14 days


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to view logs of SAP_FIN_GL_REVERSE_ACCR_DEFER aft...
entry.content: Please note that non periodic jobs have a retention period of 14 days as per the following Note https://me.sap.com/notes/0002813247

entry.title: RAP Action and Determination
entry.content:
Actions

In RAP, actions are non-standard operations that can modify the data of a Business Object (BO) instance. These actions are defined in the Behavior Definition and implemented in the Behavior Implementation. 

There are different types of actions in RAP: 

  1. Non-Factory Actions:  

   - These actions are used to implement custom logic that changes the state of an existing business object instance.  

   - They are typically instance-bound, meaning they operate on a specific instance of a business object.  

   - Example: Approving a travel request or marking an order as shipped.  

  1. Factory Actions:  

   - These actions are used to create new instances of a business object.  

   - They can be either instance-bound or static.  

   - Example: Creating a new sales order or generating a new customer record.  

Instance-Bound Actions: Used to copy one or more BO instances and create new instances based on the copied data. 

Static Actions: Used to create instances with default values. 

In this scenario to copy the instance of the maeterial entity Defined the factory action 

Copymaterial and implemented in the behavior pool. 

 

       Define the actions in the behavior definition. 

1. Create the methods in the Behavior pool and define implementations. 

 

 

METHODS copyMaterial FOR MODIFY 
IMPORTING keys FOR ACTION znp_i_material~copyMaterial. 

METHOD copyMaterial. 
DATA : lt_material TYPE TABLE FOR CREATE znp_i_material, 
lt_mitem TYPE TABLE FOR CREATE znp_i_material\_mitem. 

READ TABLE keys ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_keys>) WITH KEY 
%cid = ' '. 
ASSERT <ls_keys> IS NOT ASSIGNED. 

READ ENTITIES OF znp_i_material IN LOCAL MODE 
ENTITY znp_i_material 
ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys ) 
RESULT DATA(lt_r_mat) 
FAILED DATA(lt_fialed). 

READ ENTITIES OF znp_i_material IN LOCAL MODE 
ENTITY znp_i_material BY \_mitem 
ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( lt_r_mat ) 
RESULT DATA(lt_r_mitem). 

 
LOOP AT lt_r_mat ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_r_mat>). 
APPEND VALUE #( %cid = keys[ KEY entity matnr = <fs_r_mat>-matnr ]-%cid 
%data = CORRESPONDING #( <fs_r_mat> EXCEPT matnr ) ) 
TO lt_material ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_material>). 
<fs_material>-creationdate = cl_abap_context_info=>get_system_date( ).

APPEND VALUE #( %cid_ref = <fs_material>-%cid ) TO lt_mitem 
ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_mitem>). 

 

LOOP AT lt_r_mitem ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_r_mitem>) 
USING KEY entity WHERE matnr = <fs_r_mat>-matnr. 
APPEND VALUE #( %cid = <fs_material>-%cid && <fs_r_mitem>-werks 
%data = CORRESPONDING #( <fs_r_mitem> EXCEPT matnr ) ) 
TO <fs_mitem>-%target. 
ENDLOOP. 
ENDLOOP. 

 

MODIFY ENTITIES OF znp_i_material IN LOCAL MODE 
ENTITY znp_i_material 
CREATE FIELDS ( Baseunitofmeasure Descriptions 
FlagMaterial Materialtype creationdate industrysector ) 
WITH lt_material 
ENTITY znp_i_material 
CREATE BY \_mitem 
FIELDS ( mmsta werks pstat perkz plifz ) 
WITH lt_mitem 
MAPPED DATA(lt_mapped). 
mapped-znp_i_material = lt_mapped-znp_i_material. 
ENDMETHOD.

 

 

2.Defining the custom button in the projection view. 

3.Projecting the action to the  Fiori .

 

 

 

 When we select the instance then only the custom action is enabled.  

If we don't select the instance action is not enabled. 

  • Select the record and click on the copy material button. 
  • It will create a new instance. 

All the data Material and Item data will be copied. 

Determinations In RAP. 

Determination is an optional part of the BO behavior that modifies instances of BO based on trigger conditions. A determination is implicitly invoked by the BO’s framework if the trigger condition of the determination is fulfilled. Trigger conditions can modify operations Curd and modify fields. An invoked determination can compute data, modify entity instances according to the computation result and return messages to the consumer by passing them to be corresponding table in the Reported structure. 

       
The determination result must not change if the determination is executed several times under the same conditions, The execution order of determination is not fixed, if there is more than one determination triggered by than one determination triggered by the same condition, you cannot know which determination is executed first, Once a determination has been triggered, it must run independently from other determinations. 

  In this scenario update the status of material whether it will in the production or discontinued based on that the material will be flagged. 

 

Behavior definition. 

 

 

managed implementation in class zbp_i_material unique; 
strict ( 2 ); 

define behavior for znp_i_material //alias <alias_name> 
implementation in class zcl_np_material unique 
persistent table znp_t_materials 
lock master 
authorization master ( instance ) 
early numbering 
{ 
factory action copyMaterial [1]; 
internal action status; 
create; 
update; 
delete; 
field ( readonly ) Matnr; 
association _MITEM { create ( features : instance ) ; } 
mapping for znp_t_materials 
{ 
matnr = matnr ; 
creationdate = ersda ; 
Descriptions = matkl ; 
Baseunitofmeasure = meins ; 
Materialtype = mtart ; 
FlagMaterial = lvorm ; 
industrysector = mbrsh ; 
} 

} 

define behavior for znp_i_mitem //alias <alias_name> 
implementation in class zcl_np_mitem unique 
persistent table znp_t_mitems 
lock dependent by _material 
authorization dependent by _material 
{ 
update; 
delete; 
field ( readonly ) Matnr; 
action markmaterial result [1] $self; 
determination updatestatus on modify {create; field mmsta; } 
association _material; 
mapping for znp_t_mitems 
{ 
matnr = matnr; 
mmsta = mmsta; 
werks = werks ; 
pstat = pstat; 
perkz = perkz; 
plifz = plifz; 
} 

}

 

 

 Defining and implementing method in behavior pool.

 

 

METHOD status. 
TYPES : BEGIN OF ty_m, 
FlagMaterial TYPE lvorm, 
status TYPE char2, 
END OF ty_m. 

DATA : lt_mat TYPE TABLE OF ty_m. 
READ ENTITIES OF znp_i_material IN LOCAL MODE 
ENTITY znp_i_material 
FIELDS ( matnr ) 
WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys ) 
RESULT DATA(lt_material). 

 
READ ENTITIES OF znp_i_material IN LOCAL MODE 
ENTITY znp_i_material BY \_mitem 
FIELDS ( mmsta ) 
WITH CORRESPONDING #( lt_material ) 
RESULT DATA(lt_mitem). 

LOOP AT lt_material ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_material>). 

LOOP AT lt_mitem ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_item>) 
USING KEY entity 
WHERE matnr = <fs_material>-matnr. 
APPEND VALUE #( status = <fs_item>-mmsta ) TO lt_mat. 
ENDLOOP. 
LOOP AT lt_mat ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_mat>). 
IF <fs_mat>-status = 'A'. 
<fs_material>-flagmaterial = ' '. 
elseif <fs_mat>-status = 'D'. 
<fs_material>-flagmaterial = 'X'. 
ENDIF. 
ENDLOOP. 
ENDLOOP. 

MODIFY ENTITIES OF znp_i_material IN LOCAL MODE 
ENTITY znp_i_material 
UPDATE FIELDS ( FlagMaterial ) 
WITH CORRESPONDING #( lt_material ). 
ENDMETHOD. 

METHOD updatestatus. 
data it_material TYPE STANDARD TABLE of znp_i_material WITH UNIQUE HASHED KEY key components matnr. 
it_material = CORRESPONDING #( keys discarding duplicates mapping matnr = matnr ). 

MODIFY ENTITIES OF znp_i_material IN LOCAL MODE 
ENTITY znp_i_material 
EXECUTE status 
from corresponding #( it_material ). 
ENDMETHOD.

 

 

 he material is set to discontinued status By setting field value as ‘D’ then the field flag material is set to x and displayed as yes in the front end.

entry.title: Using two different versions of SAP B1 Clients on same PC for patch update
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have SBO 2311 Client installed and running. Is it possible to install SBO 2408 client on the same user PC configured with different server and parallelly use with 2311 for checking purposes. If everything going well with 2408, then we can just restore running 2311 database to 2408 database on a cutoff date and start using 2408 by discontinuing 2311.

If there is any document explaining how can this be done, please refer to.

Thanks & regards,

kbasher
